subcodes.first_line: O true spiritual servant of the Abhá Beauty! The meaning of thy eloquent letter was understood, replete with sentiments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حقیقی روحانی جمال ابهی مضمون نامه بلیغ مفهوم شد مشحون باحساسات
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment
